Prairie Sample Airlines and Prairie Sample Bank describe the Prairie Voyager Card.
New personal cardmembers may earn 50,000 Prairie miles after $3,000 in eligible purchases within 90 days.
The card runs on the Visa network and has a $99 annual fee.
Offer ends September 30, 2026.
Miles may take up to 10 weeks to post after qualifying activity.
Not available to applicants who currently have this fictional card.
